question: Is the image a realistic photo of an art studio with natural light coming from a window?
Is there exactly 1 light wood-colored easel standing upright in the center of the frame?
Is the easel holding exactly 1 vertical canvas that is pure white with no pattern?
Are stretched staple marks visible at the edges of the canvas?
Is there exactly 1 black metal clamp lamp clamped on the table edge to the left of the canvas?
Is the lamp head angled toward the upper part of the canvas, creating hard shadows?
Is there exactly 1 oval wooden palette on the tabletop in front of the easel?
Does the palette surface show dried paint cracks and scratches?
Are there exactly 6 paint tubes lying flat in a row to the right of the palette?
Are the paint tubes arranged from left to right in the exact order: red, blue, yellow, white, green, black?
Do the paint tubes have metal bodies that are slightly wrinkled?
Do all paint tube openings face toward the right?
Is there exactly 1 transparent glass water jar to the left of the palette?
Is the water level in the jar about half full with water marks visible on the walls?
Is there exactly 1 white ceramic brush cup positioned behind the water jar?
Are there exactly 7 paintbrush handles visible in the cup with bristles of varying shades pointing upward?
Are there exactly 2 fine-tipped brushes placed diagonally in front of the water jar?
Are the two fine-tipped brushes parallel with black tips pointing toward the lower left?
Is there 1 linen rag crumpled into a ball to the lower right of the fine brushes?
Is the rag off-white with multicolored paint stains?
Are there exactly 2 plain sketchbooks lying open at the front left of the tabletop?
Is the left sketchbook closer to the lower left with slightly curled page corners?
Is the right sketchbook slightly offset to the upper right relative to the left one?
Are the pages of both sketchbooks completely blank?
Are there exactly 3 graphite pencils placed horizontally between the two sketchbooks?
Are the pencil barrels colored gray, dark green, and natural wood respectively?
Do all pencil tips point to the right?
Are there exactly 2 erasers placed side by side below the pencils?
Is the left eraser standard white and the right eraser pink with obvious edge refraction?
Are there exactly 2 rolls of tape (1 beige masking, 1 rainbow holographic) standing upright to the right of the erasers?
Are the holes of both tape rolls facing the camera?
Is there exactly 1 black plaster bust figurine at the right rear of the easel?
Is the bust's face turned toward the left with an obvious highlight on the nose bridge?
Is there exactly 1 ochre terracotta vase with fine texture at the left rear of the easel?
Are there exactly 7 daisies in the vase with stems crossing at the opening?
Are the daisy petals pure black with yellowish centers?
Is there exactly 1 transparent glass fruit bowl at the right front of the easel?
Are there exactly 4 green pears inside the bowl, touching each other?
Do the pear skins have small speckles?
Is there exactly 1 light wood-colored round stool at the lower left corner of the frame?
Are there clear wear marks on the seat surface of the stool?
Are all objects free from severe geometric distortion or rendering artifacts?
Is the image free from physically implausible elements (e.g., floating objects)?
